notes: Hotfix + stats: second-match crash fixed (signal double-connect guarded), ESC on home now opens STAY/QUIT confirm modal instead of closing the game, lifetime stats tracked (kills/deaths/K-D/matches/wins/best score), sidebar + account page show live numbers.
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
